channel.title: 2026-04-07 AI × Science 文献日报 RSS
channel.description: 2026-04-07 当天筛选出的 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉文献 RSS。

item.title: Defect–composition coupling governing mechanical failure in CO2–CH4 hydrates
item.description:
📚 Journal of Physics: Condensed Matter
👤 Xiaoyu Shi, Yongxiao Qu, Gaoyang Luo, Zhisen Zhang and Jianyang Wu
Understanding the mechanical stability of CO2–CH4 heteroclathrate hydrates is essential for assessing reservoir stability during CO2–CH4 replacement. However, the coupled effects of mixed guest compositions and intrinsic lattice defects on hydrate mechanics remain unclear. In this work, molecular dynamics simulations were employed to investigate the mechanical behavior and microstructural evolution of CO2–CH4 heteroclathrate hydrates containing controlled water-vacancy defects (0%–2.17%) under uniaxial tension. The results show that increasing CO2 content and water-vacancy concentration both significantly degrade tensile strength, critical strain, and Young’s modulus. Mechanical weakening is particularly pronounced when CO2 occupies small 512 cages. Water-vacancy defects further accelerat…

item.title: Numerical analysis of the plasma density profile of a laser wakefield accelerator using multi-objective Bayesian optimization
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Semion Tchetovsky, Igor A Andriyash and Jérôme Faure
Laser wakefield acceleration (LWFA) provides a compact pathway to generate high-energy electron beams, but its performance depends on a large set of coupled, nonlinear parameters. Machine-learning approaches, particularly Bayesian optimization (BO), have become valuable for efficiently exploring this space. In this study, we examine how the longitudinal plasma density profile affects the properties of LWFA electron beams using high-fidelity quasi-3D particle-in-cell simulations guided by BO. We focus specifically on the influence of the injection gradient and the plasma density down-ramp length. This work establishes a systematic methodology for multi-parameter and multi-objectives optimization of LWFAs and offers design guidance for the upcoming laser-plasma acceleration center installat…

item.title: 高压原子氢的神经网络波函数
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Research
👤 David Linteau, Saverio Moroni, Giuseppe Carleo, and Markus Holzmann
该工作构建了统一处理电子与质子的神经网络量子态波函数，在玻恩-奥本海默近似及其超越框架下研究高压原子氢。计算得到的基态能量匹配或优于投影蒙特卡洛基准结果，并捕捉到极端压缩下晶体有序向类液相的转变。

item.title: [ASAP] Unraveling the Temperature Effects on the Raman Spectra of V2O5 by Combining Machine Learning and Molecular Dynamics
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Hengkang Pan, Annette Trunschke, Yuanqing Wang, and Runhai Ouyang
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00632

item.title: 分子级识别表面驱动机器学习区分同源气体
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Yu Liu, Xiaowei Li, Xinghua Li, Luyao Niu, Aoqun Xue, Liwei Zhang, Xi Wu, Wanying Cheng, Haipeng Dong, Mengxia Cui, Mingzhuang Liu, Chaohan Han, Jiayu Xin, Changlu Shao, Yichun Liu
该工作围绕分子级识别表面的设计与构建展开，结合机器学习方法实现结构相似同源气体的高精度区分。研究涉及新型传感材料的表面工程与智能识别算法，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 分子级识别表面驱动机器学习区分同源气体
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Yu Liu, Xiaowei Li, Xinghua Li, Luyao Niu, Aoqun Xue, Liwei Zhang, Xi Wu, Wanying Cheng, Haipeng Dong, Mengxia Cui, Mingzhuang Liu, Chaohan Han, Jiayu Xin, Changlu Shao, Yichun Liu
该工作设计具有分子级识别功能的表面，结合机器学习算法实现对结构相似同源气体的高精度区分与识别，为智能气体传感提供新策略，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: Federated learning for 2D synchrotron x-ray diffractometry: a cross-institutional approach for phase quantification of Ti–6Al–4V alloy
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Weiqi Yue, Qingzhe Guo, Redad Mehdi, Gabriel Ponon, Ozan Dernek, Ayorinde E Olatunde, Pawan K Tripathi, Bonnie Whitney, Anthony Spangenberger, Diana A Lados, Donald W Brown, Bjorn Clausen, Amit Samanta, Frank Ernst, Matthew A Willard, Erman Ayday and Roger H French
High-energy Two dimensional (2D) synchrotron x-ray diffractometry provides important insights into the atomistic structure and phase evolution of materials, yet traditional analysis methods remain complex, knowledge-intensive, and computationally demanding. Deep-learning models offer a powerful alternative for automating their analysis. Institutions that hold these datasets may be unwilling to share their data due to privacy and security policies, as well as the challenges associated with large-scale data transfer. As a result, models trained on local datasets often perform well only on their own data but exhibit bias and poor generalization across different instruments or facilities. To overcome these limitations, we explore federated learning (FL) for 2D synchrotron diffractograms, enab…

item.title: Physics-Based Factorized Machine Learning for Predicting Ionic Dielectric Tensors
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. X
👤 Atsushi Takigawa, Shin Kiyohara, and Yu Kumagai
Author(s): Atsushi Takigawa, Shin Kiyohara, and Yu Kumagai A machine-learning methodology helps screen thousands of candidate oxides to identify materials with excellent dielectric properties. [Phys. Rev. X 16, 021006] Published Tue Apr 07, 2026

item.title: Self-adaptive weighting and sampling for physics-informed neural networks
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Wenqian Chen, Amanda Howard and Panos Stinis
Physics-informed deep learning has emerged as a promising framework for solving partial differential equations (PDEs). Nevertheless, training these models on complex problems remains challenging, often leading to limited accuracy and efficiency. In this work, we introduce a hybrid adaptive sampling and weighting method to enhance the performance of physics-informed neural networks (PINNs). The adaptive sampling component identifies training points in regions where the solution exhibits rapid variation, while the adaptive weighting component balances the convergence rate across training points. Numerical experiments show that applying only adaptive sampling or only adaptive weighting is insufficient to consistently achieve accurate predictions, particularly when training points are scarce.…

item.title: [ASAP] Symmetry-Orchestrated Spin Relaxation in Bilayer CrI3: A Time-Domain ab initio Study
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Yongjia Li, Haoran Lu, Run Long, and Wei-Hai Fang
The Journal of Physical Chemistry Letters DOI: 10.1021/acs.jpclett.6c00698

item.title: Electro-optic effects in ferroelectrics from first principles
item.description:
📚 Journal of Physics: Condensed Matter
👤 Qiyuan Hu, Zhenlong Zhang, Xueqing Wan, Jinyang Ni and Zhijun Jiang
This review summarizes recent first-principles studies on electro-optic (EO) effects in ferroelectric materials, focusing on linear and nonlinear EO responses, strain engineering of EO coefficients in three-dimensional (3D) and two-dimensional (2D) ferroelectrics. The linear and nonlinear EO effects are predicted in Pb(Zr,Ti)O3 and BaTiO3 ferroelectric oxides, respectively, which is in good agreement with the previous experimental findings. The origin of such different responses can be understood by the electric-field-induced behavior of some specific phonon frequencies and some force constants. The large linear and nonlinear EO responses are also predicted in 2D ferroelectric SnS monolayer. Furthermore, it is demonstrated that the EO responses of AlN/ScN superlattices, NbOI2, and sliding…

item.title: 孪晶堆叠二维磁性CrSBr双层中的增强层间耦合与激子
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Sijia Ke, Yusuf Shaidu, and Jeffrey B. Neaton
该研究通过第一性原理计算揭示了孪晶堆叠构型对二维磁性材料CrSBr双层中层间耦合及激子性质的显著增强效应。层间耦合的增强可能调控其磁基态与光学响应，为二维磁电耦合器件的设计提供了理论依据。

item.title: 分子铁电体增强的高电压输出压电弹性体
item.description:
📚 Nano Letters: Latest Articles (ACS Publications)
👤 Xiao-Cui Rao, Qiu-Yue Hu, Yu-Ting Zhang, Hong-Ji Liu, Xiao-Long Wu, Zhong-Bin Pan, Wei-Qiang Liao, Jingling Yan, and Ben-Lin Hu
该工作将分子铁电体引入压电弹性体体系，显著提升了其电压输出性能。分子铁电体的引入优化了材料的电极化响应与机械-电转换效率，为柔性传感器与能量收集器件的开发提供了新材料策略。

item.title: 组分编程自组装实现拓扑转变：从二维网络到离散大卫之星结构
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Fengxue Liu, Qiangqiang Dong, Feng Wang, Ning Wang, Lijun Wang, He Zhao, Die Liu, Yiming Li, Mingzhao Chen, Zhilong Jiang, Qianqian Liu, Pingshan Wang, Jun Wang
该工作提出基于组分编程的超分子自组装策略，实现从二维网络到离散大卫之星拓扑结构的精准转变。研究揭示了分子设计参数与拓扑构型之间的构效关系，为复杂纳米结构的按需构筑提供了新思路。

item.title: 有效自旋-1/2体系NdVO₄的晶体场方案与磁场诱导临界行为
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Dheeraj Ranaut, D. T. Adroja, Mohamed Aouane, Prashanta K. Mukharjee, Philipp Gegenwart, and D. Jaiswal-Nagar
该工作系统研究了稀土化合物NdVO₄的晶体场能级结构与磁场诱导量子临界行为。作为有效自旋-1/2体系，其局域磁矩与低能激发特性使其成为探索场诱导量子现象的理想平台，具体相图与临界指数需查阅原文。

item.title: 基于堆叠范德华铁电体α-In₂Se₃中人工带电畴壁的场效应晶体管
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Shahriar Muhammad Nahid, Haiyue Dong, Gillian M. Nolan, SungWoo Nam, Nadya Mason, Pinshane Y. Huang, Arend M. van der Zande
该工作通过在堆叠的二维铁电材料α-In₂Se₃中构建人工带电畴壁，实现了新型场效应晶体管器件，利用铁电极化畴壁作为导电沟道，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 基于堆叠范德华铁电α-In₂Se₃中人工带电畴壁的场效应晶体管
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Shahriar Muhammad Nahid, Haiyue Dong, Gillian M. Nolan, SungWoo Nam, Nadya Mason, Pinshane Y. Huang, Arend M. van der Zande
该工作利用堆叠范德华铁电体α-In₂Se₃中的可控带电畴壁作为导电沟道，构筑了新型场效应晶体管。人工设计的畴壁界面提供了可重构的输运通道，为超高密度铁电存储与逻辑器件的集成提供了新方案。

item.title: 基于堆叠范德华铁电体α-In₂Se₃中人工带电畴壁的场效应晶体管
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Shahriar Muhammad Nahid, Haiyue Dong, Gillian M. Nolan, SungWoo Nam, Nadya Mason, Pinshane Y. Huang, Arend M. van der Zande
该工作通过在堆叠的二维铁电材料α-In₂Se₃中构建人工带电畴壁，实现了新型场效应晶体管器件，利用铁电极化畴壁作为导电沟道，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 环保制备高质量无铅卤化物铁电固溶体用于高性能X射线探测
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Chang‐Feng Wang, Haojin Li, Cai Ning, Lang Wang, Qing‐Feng Luo, Telun Li, Hao‐Fei Ni, Zhongfu An, Zhi‐Xu Zhang, Jinlan Wang, Da‐Wei Fu, Ming‐Gang Ju, Kui Zhao, Yi Zhang
该工作围绕无铅卤化物铁电固溶体的绿色合成策略及其X射线探测性能展开，旨在开发环境友好型高灵敏辐射探测材料。作者通过组分调控优化铁电特性与载流子输运，具体制备方法与性能指标需查阅原文。

item.title: 用于磁引导跨血管导航的液态金属微型机器人
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Xiaohui Ju, Roshan Velluvakandy, Xianghua Wu, Miguel Angel Merlos Rodrigo, Zbyněk Heger, Kamila Bendíčková, Jan Frič, Martin Pumera
该工作围绕液态金属微型机器人在磁引导下的跨血管导航应用展开，旨在实现精准的体内靶向递送或诊疗操作，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 用于磁引导跨血管导航的液态金属微型机器人
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Materials: Table of Contents
👤 Xiaohui Ju, Roshan Velluvakandy, Xianghua Wu, Miguel Angel Merlos Rodrigo, Zbyněk Heger, Kamila Bendíčková, Jan Frič, Martin Pumera
该工作围绕液态金属微型机器人在磁引导下的跨血管导航应用展开，旨在实现精准的体内靶向递送或诊疗操作，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 人工亚铁磁体中本征对称性破缺诱导的磁子-磁子耦合
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Mohammad Tomal Hossain, Hang Chen, Subhash Bhatt, Mojtaba Taghipour Kaffash, Mitra M. Subedi, John Q. Xiao, Joseph Sklenar, and M. Benjamin Jungfleisch
人工反铁磁体具有丰富的高频磁子能谱，其光学与声学磁子支可发生杂化。本研究在由两种不同反铁磁耦合磁性层构成的人工亚铁磁体中，演示了由本征对称性破缺诱导的声学-光学磁子耦合效应，为磁子学器件的能带工程提供了新途径。

item.title: 机械输入提升金刚石量子传感器性能：品质因数突破百万
item.description:
📚 Physics News
金刚石色心作为量子传感平台具有显著优势，仅需少量量子比特即可运行。本报道介绍加州大学圣塔芭芭拉分校研究团队通过机械输入调控，将金刚石量子传感器的品质因数（Q值）提升至超过一百万，推动量子传感技术向更高灵敏度发展。

item.title: 铁电单层InCrTe₃中极化依赖磁各向异性的微观机制
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Jiaqi Li, Yaxin Pan, Jiazhuang Si, Fengzhu Ren, Bing Wang, and Jun-Hyung Cho
该研究揭示了二维铁磁铁电材料InCrTe₃中电极化方向调控磁各向异性的微观物理机制。通过第一性原理计算分析了自旋-轨道耦合与晶体场的竞争关系，为电场调控的自旋电子器件提供了理论指导。

item.title: Y₃Fe₅O₁₂/LiNbO₃异质结构中声子泵浦诱导的非线性磁阻尼
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Tengfei Zhang, Zimu Li, Feng Li, Yixin Fan, Quwen Wang, Qian Zhao, Qingfang Liu, Jianbo Wang, Guoqiang Yu, and Jinwu Wei
该实验工作首次观测并表征了LiNbO₃/Y₃Fe₅O₁₂异质结构中由声子泵浦效应产生的非线性磁阻尼。声子频率依赖的阻尼贡献为磁振子-声子耦合的调控提供了新途径，在磁声器件与自旋波操控方面具有应用潜力。

item.title: 基于物理描述符无需显式双层建模预测异质双层中的滑移铁电性
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. B
👤 Xian Wang, Qun Zeng, Jun Zhou, Xuesen Wang, Mingli Yang, Lei Shen, and Yuan Ping Feng
该研究发展了基于物理描述符的高通量筛选方法，无需进行耗时的显式双层计算即可预测异质双层中的滑移铁电性。该方法大幅扩展了二维铁电材料的设计空间，为超薄存储器件的材料筛选提供了高效理论工具。

item.title: 双层1T′-ReS₂滑移诱导垂直铁电性及其高效光伏应用
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Meng Ge, Jianing Tan, Degao Xu, and Gang Ouyang
滑移铁电性为二维铁电材料开发开辟了新方向，但其多态铁电机制及与光电性质的关联尚不明确。本研究通过第一性原理计算，揭示双层1T′-ReS₂中滑移诱导的垂直铁电性机制，并探索其在高效光伏器件中的应用潜力。

item.title: Spin-wave resonance in yttrium iron garnet stripe domains
item.description:
📚 Editors' Suggestions
👤 Daniel Prestwood, Christopher E. A. Barker, Kilian D. Stenning, Charlie W. F. Freeman, Tianyi Wei, Takashi Kikkawa, Troy Dion, Daniel Stoeffler, Yves Henry, Matthieu Bailleul, Noora Naushad, William Griggs, Thomas Thomson, Murat Cubukcu, Jack C. Gartside, Eiji Saitoh, Will R. Branford, and Hidekazu Kurebayashi
Author(s): Daniel Prestwood, Christopher E. A. Barker, Kilian D. Stenning, Charlie W. F. Freeman, Tianyi Wei, Takashi Kikkawa, Troy Dion, Daniel Stoeffler, Yves Henry, Matthieu Bailleul, Noora Naushad, William Griggs, Thomas Thomson, Murat Cubukcu, Jack C. Gartside, Eiji Saitoh, Will R. Branford, and Hidekazu Kurebayashi By combining static and dynamic measurement techniques, the authors reveal here a rich set of resonant spin wave modes due to stripe domain formations in a YIG film. The authors show how the micromagnetic state of the film greatly impacts the resonant modes observed, and provide detailed analysis of both the static and dynamic behavior using micromagnetic simulations. [Phys. Rev. B 113, 134410] Published Tue Apr 07, 2026

item.title: 超原子畸变诱导二维反铁磁体中的三铁性与自旋劈裂
item.description:
📚 Wiley: Advanced Science: Table of Contents
👤 Zhen Gao, Fengxian Ma, Guoping Gao, Weizhen Meng, Ying Liu, Yandong Ma, Yalong Jiao
该工作围绕二维反铁磁材料中超原子结构畸变引发的丰富物理效应展开，预言或验证了由超原子畸变导致的三铁性（铁电、铁磁、铁弹共存）及自旋劈裂现象，为低维多铁材料设计提供新思路，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 热退火诱导对称性破缺实现垂直亚铁磁体的无场自旋-轨道力矩翻转
item.description:
📚 Phys. Rev. Applied
👤 Baoshan Cui, Pengxiang Zhao, Cuimei Cao, Jijun Yun, Tengyu Guo, Zengtai Zhu, Wenjie Song, Qingfeng Zhan, Dan Liu, Hao Wu, Haifeng Du, Kang L. Wang, Baogen Shen, and Guoqiang Yu
电流驱动的自旋-轨道力矩（SOT）是操控垂直磁化的有效途径，但确定性翻转通常需外加面内磁场破缺对称性。本研究利用热退火诱导的固有对称性破缺，在垂直亚铁磁体中实现了无需外磁场的SOT翻转，为低功耗、超快自旋电子器件简化架构设计提供了解决方案。
